customer_anxiety_profile: Low expressed anxiety on this call — Stanley was cooperative and low-resistance throughout. However, his unprompted prior-contact reference ('I think you guys were out here before') introduces mild uncertainty about what he may have already been shown or promised. He is not hostile, but he is not fully informed about what to expect from the appointment.
unresolved_concerns: Prior Ion contact — Stanley believes Ion may have visited or called before, but neither he nor Bucky confirmed what happened. Closer should check CRM for prior activity before the call.
Prior design — Bucky asked whether Stanley had seen a design but abandoned the question before getting an answer. Closer does not know if Stanley has already reviewed a proposal.
sensitive_topics_raised: Prior Ion contact / possible prior design — Stanley raised this unprompted at 07:18. Treat as a trust-sensitive topic: if a prior rep made promises or showed numbers, the closer needs to know before opening.
exact_promises_rep_made: Specialist will call Monday at 5:00 PM.
Bucky will send a text reminder after the call.
The appointment is a phone call — no in-person visit.
closer_should_know: Stanley referenced Ion having been out to his home before and mentioned satellite/Google Earth imaging — he has prior context about Ion's methodology. Check CRM for prior activity before the call. If a prior design exists, open by acknowledging it rather than re-pitching from scratch. Stanley's $350/month bill was captured but never emotionally anchored — the closer has a clean opportunity to open with that number as the pain frame.
